hero_desc:
Performance-bred Nigerian Dwarf goats in Brighton, Tennessee.
DHIR Milk Testing · Linear Appraisal · Show Participation
intro_para1: Rustic Back Acres Farm began in 2020 with a simple dream and four goats. What started as pets to fulfill a long-held wish quickly grew into something more. As our love for these animals deepened, so did our herd.
intro_para2: Our foundation is built on faith, family, and a commitment to quality breeding. We focus on ADGA and AGS-registered Nigerian Dwarf goats, carefully selecting for excellent conformation, strong milk production, and sound genetics.
